title: NVIDIA ACE Overview and Audio2Face
citation: NVIDIA Docs. NVIDIA ACE Overview. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Commercial animation-adapter evaluation for Audio2Face, Audio2Emotion, and digital human pipelines.
claims_supported: NVIDIA ACE includes digital human technologies for speech, intelligence, and animation.
NVIDIA ACE documentation references Audio2Face 2D/3D and Audio2Emotion capabilities.
claims_not_supported: That NVIDIA ACE is open-source or permissively licensed for unrestricted redistribution.
That OpenClinXR can use NVIDIA services without accepting vendor terms and privacy review.
